# TKTLVRecord

**Class**

The base class encapsulating a Tag-Length-Value record.

## Declaration

```swift
class TKTLVRecord
```

## Overview

The CryptoTokenKit framework provides the following concrete subclasses for various TLV record encodings:

- [doc://com.apple.cryptotokenkit/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKBERTLVRecord] for BER-TLV encoding rules
- [doc://com.apple.cryptotokenkit/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKSimpleTLVRecord] for Simple-TLV encoding according to ISO 7816-4
- [doc://com.apple.cryptotokenkit/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKCompactTLVRecord] for Compact-TLV encoding according to ISO 7816-4

## Creating Records

- **sequenceOfRecords(from:)**: Creates and returns an array of TLV records from the specified data.
- **init(from:)**: Creates and returns a TLV record from by parsing the specified data.

## Accessing the Tag Field

- **tag**: The tag field of the record.
- **TKTLVTag**: The type used to identify TLV format tags.

## Accessing the Value Field

- **value**: The value field of the record.

## Accessing Record Data

- **data**: The record data, including the tag, length, and value fields.

## Working with Tag-Length-Value Records

- **TKBERTLVRecord**: An object that parses BER-encoded data and produces DER-encoded data for TLV records.
- **TKCompactTLVRecord**: An object that implements encoding using Compact-TLV encoding according to ISO 7816-4.
- **TKSimpleTLVRecord**: An object that implements encoding using Simple-TLV encoding according to ISO 7816-4.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Inherited By

- TKBERTLVRecord
- TKCompactTLVRecord
- TKSimpleTLVRecord

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
